tooltip.echoes.thrusters.hint: Hold use to fly where you look; right-click a Coil or Accumulator to recharge
tooltip.echoes.resonant.lore: Tuned to the octave — rhythmic balanced interchange.
tooltip.echoes.stillness.lore: The still magnetic centre of zero — all motion springs from rest.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echocite_ore: Overworld ore — drops Raw Echocite, the base of every recipe.
tooltip.echoes.desc.deepslate_echocite_o: The deepslate form of Echocite Ore.
tooltip.echoes.desc.drumstone_ore: A percussive ore — drops Drumstone Shards for Drum Cores.
tooltip.echoes.desc.silentite_ore: Rare Deep Dark ore — drops Silentite Crystals.
tooltip.echoes.desc.stillness_core: The still centre of zero: slowly generates Light from rest.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonator: Generative Coil — winds ambient sound into stored Light.
tooltip.echoes.desc.tuning_conduit: Wave Conduit — carries Light between devices (1,000/t).
tooltip.echoes.desc.crusher: Compressor — crushes ore into doubled dust using Light.
tooltip.echoes.desc.attunement_furnace: Transmuter — smelts any furnace recipe with Light, no fuel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.radiator: Radiates Light as life — grows nearby crops and saplings.
tooltip.echoes.desc.warmth_radiator: Radiates heat — cooks dropped items and melts nearby ice.
tooltip.echoes.desc.polarity_field: Two poles in one: Attract pulls items in, Repel casts mobs out.
tooltip.echoes.desc.balancer: Evens Light across all storage on its network.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_relay: Wave Relay — beams items, fluids, and Light over a channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_amplifier: Amplitude Coil — doubles a channel's throughput (×16 cap).
tooltip.echoes.desc.harmonic_filter: Harmonic Filter — restricts a channel's items to a whitelist.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_splitter: Interchange Splitter — even round-robin vs. fill-first delivery.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echo_repeater: Octave Repeater — extends a channel across dimensions.
tooltip.echoes.desc.conduit_coupler: Polarity Coupler — bridges the wired grid to a wireless channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_chest: Locked Potential Vault — 27-slot storage that lives on a channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.note_relay: Tone Relay — broadcasts redstone over a channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.raw_echocite: Smelt into an Echo Ingot, or crush for doubled dust.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echocite_dust: Smelt into an Echo Ingot. Crushed from raw echocite.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echo_ingot: The core crafting material of the mod.
tooltip.echoes.desc.echo_dust: Echocite + glowstone dust — crafts the Octave Atlas.
tooltip.echoes.desc.dull_ingot: A cheap alternate conduit material, smelted from Slag.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_slag: Crushing byproduct — smelt into a Dull Ingot.
tooltip.echoes.desc.drumstone_shard: Percussive shard — four make a Drum Core.
tooltip.echoes.desc.drum_core: An alternate Coil membrane; also powers the Thrusters.
tooltip.echoes.desc.silentite_crystal: Silent crystal of the Deep Dark — for the Stillness Core.
tooltip.echoes.desc.frequency_tuner: Octave Tuner — copy/paste a channel; sneak-use opens device config.
tooltip.echoes.desc.channel_atlas: Octave Atlas — lists the devices on each active channel.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonance_meter: Light Meter — reads a device's role, stored Light, and flow.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonance_thrusters: Centrifugal Thrusters — hold use to fly where you look.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_pickaxe: Resonant tool — tuned to the octave; deliberately over-tuned.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_axe: Resonant tool — tuned to the octave; deliberately over-tuned.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_shovel: Resonant tool — tuned to the octave; deliberately over-tuned.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_sword: Resonant blade — tuned to the octave; a hefty attack bonus.
tooltip.echoes.desc.resonant_hoe: Resonant tool — tuned to the octave; deliberately over-tuned.
